northstar-plan.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md as the source of truth. Execute /northstar-plan with the user arguments, follow the planning contract, and show exact node --run northstar argv before mutation.

northstar-grill.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-grill: ask one question at a time; if brief/config paths are provided, run node --run northstar -- plan-grill --config <config> --brief <brief> --dry-run from __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__ and present only nextQuestion.

northstar-to-spec.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-to-spec: synthesize known context into a PRD/spec without restarting the interview. Use node --run northstar -- plan-spec --config <config> --brief <brief> --answers <answers> --out <spec> when paths are available.

northstar-to-plan.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-to-plan: create a northstar:implementation-planning execution contract with checkbox steps, exact commands, expected outcomes, commit boundaries, workflow-stage mapping, issue-slicing hints, and runtime/Project evidence expectations. Use node --run northstar -- plan-implementation --config <config> --spec <spec> --out <plan> when paths are available.

northstar-to-issues.description: Northstar issue draft or creation flow
northstar-to-issues.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-to-issues: generate tracer-bullet vertical slices, dry-run first with node --run northstar -- plan-issues --config <config> --spec <spec> --plan <plan> --dry-run, and only use --apply --confirmed after explicit approval.

northstar-setup.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-setup: run read-only discovery and doctor checks first with node --run skill:doctor or node --run northstar -- doctor as supported by the current CLI; do not write config or mutate GitHub/Project state until the relevant gate is approved.

northstar-init.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md and follow /northstar-setup behavior. Call the Northstar CLI through node --run northstar -- before any setup mutation.

northstar-execute.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-execute: before watch/start/reconcile/release, show issue queue, dependencies, host adapter, workflow, release mode, exact argv, and expected effects. Use node --run northstar -- watch/start/reconcile/release with the approved config and issue scope.

northstar-watch.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md and follow /northstar-execute behavior. Use node --run northstar -- watch with the approved config and issue scope.

northstar-observe.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-observe as read-only inspection of runtime, GitHub issue/PR state, Project projection, blockers, and release evidence. Use node --run northstar -- inspect --summary for runtime summaries.

northstar-status.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md and follow /northstar-observe behavior. Use node --run northstar -- inspect --summary when a summary is requested.

northstar-recover.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-recover: diagnose first, run low-risk inspect/reconcile when useful, and ask before branch, PR, runtime lifecycle, Project, or release mutation. Use node --run northstar -- inspect/reconcile/retry-sync/release with explicit argv.

northstar-recovery.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md and follow /northstar-recover behavior. Use node --run northstar -- reconcile/retry-sync/release only after the recovery gate is approved.

northstar-report.template: Use __NORTHSTAR_ROOT__/docs/agent-playbooks/northstar-operator.md. Execute /northstar-report: produce issue URLs, PR URLs, merge SHAs, dependency order, browser/UAT evidence when applicable, recovery actions, unresolved blockers, and recommended next actions. Use node --run northstar -- inspect --summary and other read-only CLI calls for evidence.
